subcodes.first_line: O assured leaf! However comely the countenance of Layli, it is the guidance of the Almighty that is the true manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه موقنه لیلی هر نه قدر ملاحت رخساره مالک ایسه ده هدایت پروردگاره مظهر
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @role and station of women, @beauty; grace; aesthetics
